info.title: DUMLIS University Management API
info.description: RESTful API for Damietta University Management and Learning Information System. Covers students, courses, enrollments, grades, attendance, financial records, schedules, rooms, committees, and registration requests.

post.description:
Authenticate with username + password, return JWT access token.
Response includes user_role and student_id (if student role).

get.description: Return current authenticated user info.
List all faculties — public read access.

post.description:
Create a new faculty. Only super_admin can create faculties.

Example request:
```json
{
  "id": "FCAI",
  "name": "كلية الحاسبات والذكاء الاصطناعي",
  "name_en": "Faculty of Computers and AI",
  "icon": "💻",
  "student_count": 2000,
  "staff_count": 120,
  "color": "bg-primary-600"
}
```

get.description: Get a single faculty by ID — public read access.

put.description: Update a faculty's metadata. Only super_admin can update faculties.

delete.description: Delete a faculty (cascades to departments and students). Only super_admin.

get.description: List departments, strictly scoped by faculty for faculty admins.
List students with optional filters.
Total student count with optional filters.
Get aggregate student statistics for the dashboard.
Get a student with their detailed profile.

put.description: Update student fields (status, GPA, fees, department, etc.).

delete.description: Delete a student and all related records (cascades).

post.description: Create or fully replace a student's detailed profile.

get.description: List courses with optional filters.

post.description: Add a prerequisite to a course.

get.description: List enrollments with optional filters.
List grades with optional filters.
List grades with optional filters.
List attendance records with comprehensive filters — auth required, scoped to faculty.

post.description:
Record a single attendance entry.

Example request:
```json
{
  "student_id": "20240001",
  "course_id": "CS101",
  "session_type": "محاضرة",
  "week_number": 3,
  "attendance_date": "2024-10-07",
  "status": "حاضر"
}
```

get.description:
Get attendance summary (present/absent/rate) for a student in a course.

Example response:
```json
{
  "student_id": "20240001",
  "course_id": "CS101",
  "total_sessions": 24,
  "present": 21,
  "absent": 3,
  "attendance_rate": 87.5
}
```

post.description: Bulk-insert multiple attendance records (for a whole class session).

get.description: List financial records.

Financial summary for a student.

Example response:
```json
{
  "student_id": "20240001",
  "total_due": 6800,
  "total_paid": 6000,
  "remaining": 800,
  "status": "مسدد جزئياً"
}
```
List fee setup records — scoped to faculty.

post.description:
Define fee type and amount for a faculty/level.

Example request:
```json
{
  "faculty_id": "FCAI",
  "fee_type": "رسوم الفصل الدراسي",
  "level": "المستوى الأول",
  "amount": 5500,
  "semester": "خريف",
  "academic_year": "2024-2025",
  "status": "نشط"
}
```
Auto-generate course schedules for one or all faculties.

get.description: Get availability grid for all rooms across days/times.

Get list of booked time slots for a room.
Useful for building availability grid.

schema.title: Response Room Availability Schedules Room Availability Get

get.description: List schedules with optional filters.
Return the personal schedule for a student based on their enrollments.

post.description:
Check if a room has any scheduling conflicts at a given day/time.
Returns list of conflicting schedules if any.
Create multiple course schedule entries in a single transaction.

get.description: List all rooms (classrooms and labs) with optional filters.
List examination committees — scoped to the authenticated user's faculty.

post.description:
Create an exam committee.

Example request:
```json
{
  "name": "لجنة CS101 - غرفة 101",
  "course_id": "CS101",
  "room_id": "room_101b",
  "capacity": 150,
  "exam_date": "2024-12-15",
  "exam_time": "09:00:00",
  "supervisor": "د. أحمد محمد السيد",
  "seating_rows": 10,
  "seating_cols": 15,
  "seating_layout": "standard",
  "semester": "2024-2025 خريف"
}
```

get.description: List student assignments across committees — scoped to faculty.
List all students assigned to a committee (with seat numbers).

post.description:
Assign a student to an exam committee with a seat.

Example request:
```json
{
  "student_id": "20240001",
  "committee_id": 1,
  "seat_number": "3-4",
  "seat_row": 3,
  "seat_column": 4
}
```

get.description: List registration requests — auth required, scoped to faculty.

post.description:
Submit a new registration issue request.

Example request:
```json
{
  "id": "REQ-2024-001",
  "student_id": "20240001",
  "comment": "لا يمكنني تسجيل مقرر CS305 بسبب المتطلب السابق رغم نجاحي فيه."
}
```

get.description: List student registration blocks — scoped to faculty.

post.description:
Block a student's registration.

Example request:
```json
{
  "student_id": "20210001",
  "reason": "عدم سداد الرسوم",
  "notes": "مطلوب سداد الرسوم قبل التسجيل"
}
```

put.description: Lift or update a student block.
Admin approves or rejects a registration request and provides a response.

get.description: List course equivalences, optionally filtered by student (faculty-scoped).

post.description: Create a new course equivalence record (faculty-scoped).

get.description: Get a single course equivalence by ID (faculty-scoped).
Retrieve all report signatures, scoped by faculty.

post.description: Create a new report signature within the user's faculty.

get.description: Get a specific report signature by ID, scoped by faculty.

put.description: Update an existing report signature, scoped by faculty.

delete.description: Delete a report signature, scoped by faculty.

get.description: List all programs, scoped by faculty_id.

post.description: Create a new program within the user's faculty.

get.description: Get a single program by ID, ensuring it belongs to user's faculty.

put.description: Update a program within the user's faculty.

delete.description: Delete a program within the user's faculty.

get.description: List study regulations with program details.

post.description: Create a new regulation within the user's faculty.

get.description: Get a single regulation by ID, ensuring it belongs to user's faculty.

put.description: Update a regulation within the user's faculty.

delete.description: Delete a regulation within the user's faculty.

get.description: List all academic rules, scoped by faculty.
Get academic rules for a specific faculty, enforced by scoping.
Get a single academic rule by ID.

put.description: Update an academic rule, enforced by scoping.

delete.description: Delete an academic rule, enforced by scoping.

schema.title: Response Bulk Create Requirements Student Requirements Bulk Post

get.description: List activity logs — faculty_id is enforced from the JWT token, not a raw query param.

post.description: Create an activity log entry — faculty_id is set from token.

get.description: List users. Faculty admins can only see users in their own faculty.

post.description: Create a new user. Only super_admin can create users or assign super_admin role.

put.description: Update a user. Only super_admin can modify users.

delete.description: Delete a user. Only super_admin can delete users.

schema.title: Response List Settings System Settings  Get
Response List Fee Setups Fee Setup  Get

get.description: List all survey rules, scoped by faculty.

post.description: Create a new survey rule.

get.description: Get a single survey rule by ID.
List staff members.

post.description: Create a new staff member.

get.description: Get staff member by ID.
List academic calendar events.

post.description: Create a new calendar event.

get.description: Get calendar event by ID.
List announcements (only active and non-expired).

post.description: Create a new announcement.

get.description: Get announcement by ID (only active and non-expired).

delete.description: Delete announcement (soft delete - mark as inactive).

get.description: Readiness check - verify database connection
